mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.complete_name AS completeName FROM product_category c LEFT JOIN product_category p ON p.id = c.parent_id
AND ( c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR c.complete_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR p.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
AND c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND c.complete_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.completeName}, '%')
AND c.parent_id = #{query.parentId}
AND p.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.parentName}, '%')
ORDER BY c.id DESC
